title: International Relations
shortSummary: Understand Australia's place in the world — alliances, trade, diplomacy, defence, and the geopolitics that shape domestic policy from AUKUS to ASEAN.
whyItMatters: Australia's prosperity and security depend on its international relationships. Politicians who understand geopolitics, trade, and diplomacy can make better decisions about defence spending, foreign aid, trade agreements, and Australia's strategic positioning.
coreConcepts: Australia's alliance system: AUKUS, Five Eyes, ANZUS
The role of the UN and multilateral institutions
